title: 100 Pcs Metallic Gold Balloons 5 Inch Shiny Gold Chrome Latex Balloon Mini Metallic Balloons for Birthday Baby Shower Engagement Wedding Festival Party Decorations
features: Value Pack: This gold balloon package contains 100 pcs 5 inch metallic gold balloons, Enough quantity can meet your daily life, festival or party decoration needs, a great value for the price, worth having.

Safe & Durable: These Shiny chrome gold balloons are made of high quality latex, Non-toxic and environmentally friendly, Each gold small balloons have been rigorously tested, durable and no strange smell.

Wide range of uses: These 5inch gold latex balloons are perfect for parties, Photography, Wedding, Birthday, Baby shower, Festivals Decorations, schools, shopping malls, offices, door decorations and bars, It is an indispensable element for your party.

Happy DIY Time: You can hang or stick these 5 inch gold balloons on doors, walls, ceilings, doorways and other places you want to decorate, Also use with other colours or sizes of balloons to create a beautiful balloon arch, balloon column,or multiple balloon bouquets, create more usages by using your imagination, Enjoy a fun DIY time with your family.
Support Air & Helium: The mini balloons can be filled with air or helium, when you inflate the balloons, Do not fill it too much to prevent bursting.
